channel.title: Projects on portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on portfolio

item.description:
Controller Emulator (TUI)

Tech: Python, Textual, vgamepad, evdev

Designed a terminal-based (Textual) application that maps keyboard input to a virtual gamepad, supporting Xbox, DualShock, and Wii profiles with a modal keybind editor.

Implemented profile persistence (profiles.json) and cross-platform support (Windows via vgamepad, Linux via uinput/evdev).

NixOS Install Manager

Tech: C, GPG, NixOS

Created a secure, C-based utility that manages NixOS system packages through a GPG-encrypted file, decrypting, editing, and re-encrypting before triggering nixos-rebuild.

Employs trie data structures for safe package lookups and ensures secure memory handling.
